word: G1273 - διανυκτερεύω - dianyktereúō - dee-an-ook-ter-yoo'-o - Continue all night

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Continue all night
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to cause one to pass through a place; to carry across, to journey through a place, to go through, to travel through
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1223 and a derivative of G3571; to sit up the whole night: - continue all night.
